report.summary: Fifth standup Apr 2: 38 learn pages (+2 since v4), 26,849 total lines (+5.6%). New: Parallel EVM (Monad/MegaETH) + TON Telegram Mini Apps guides. EOD-v3 ran since last standup. 80 uncommitted files in cryptodegen (+6). Day 11 deploy gap persists — P0 blocker unchanged.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v4): 2 new learn pages detected — total now 38 (up from 36). New: Parallel EVM / Monad / MegaETH Guide 2026 (718 lines) and TON Telegram Mini Apps Guide 2026 (711 lines).
CONTENT VOLUME: 26,849 lines across 38 learn page.tsx files (up from 25,420 — +1,429 lines, +5.6%). Velocity slowing vs prior cycle's +20% — expected as topic backlog narrows.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: ~632 in Degen0x (unchanged — no deploys). Publish queue at 4 pages (unchanged since v4). 2 new guides not yet added to queue.
UNCOMMITTED FILES: cryptodegen 80 files (up from 74 in v4). Degen0x workspace has no git repo — all 38 learn pages exist only as local files.
SEO PIPELINE: All 38 learn pages have Metadata exports and structured data. No GSC or Vercel Analytics accessible from sandbox.
API HEALTH: 6/6 API routes code-stable (unchanged). Fallback coverage still 2/6. Rate limiter on 2/6 routes.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: 1 agent ran since last standup (v4) — eod-v3 (QA audit). Today's total: 13 reports (5 standups, 3 builds, 2 community, 3 EODs).

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: (1) EOD-v3 confirmed 1,244 page.tsx files, 79 uncommitted files, 141 TS errors stable across same 4 files. (2) 2 new learn pages appeared (Parallel EVM + TON Mini Apps) — likely from an unlogged build or manual creation.

P0 BLOCKER (Day 11, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28 (Apr 1). Degen0x workspace has no git repo. cryptodegen at 80 uncommitted files. All 38 learn guides exist only as local files.
P1 — MISSING SCAFFOLDS: 109 published slugs still lack page.tsx files (17% gap). Unchanged — blocked on deploy pipeline.
P2 — PUBLISH QUEUE: 4 pages queued (Euler V2, Hyperlane, Crypto Staking, Flash Loans). 2 new guides (Parallel EVM, TON Mini Apps) not yet queued.
P3 — CONTENT CALENDAR: 334 tweets drafted through Jul 5. Newsletter v19 ready. 2 social card SVGs created (AI Tokens Breakout, CLARITY Act 99%).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL, Day 11): 38 learn guides, 80+ uncommitted files, 334 tweet drafts, 4+ queued pages — all stuck locally. Content stockpile growing but delivering zero organic traffic. Every cycle without deploy widens the gap between work done and value shipped. Single commit+push remains the highest-ROI action by an order of magnitude.

PRIORITY 2 — QUEUE THE NEW GUIDES: Parallel EVM and TON Mini Apps guides need adding to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Both are high-momentum topics (Monad mainnet approaching, TON Mini Apps 900M+ user reach). Next build cycle should queue these + prioritize filling the 109 missing page.tsx gap over new content.

PRIORITY 3 — API RESILIENCE: Rate limiter coverage at 2/6, fallback coverage at 2/6. defi-yields still returns 500 on failure with no graceful degradation. Low-effort, high-resilience wins — should be next build focus after deploy unblocks.

report.email: Chrome JS fetch to Resend API blocked (CORS/network restriction from browser context) — consistent with all previous cycles
